rag_rules: Use `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks to contain AGREE contracts
Place assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations in component type annexes
Use implementation annexes for assignments when valid in that scope
Only assign to existing output features or declared auxiliary variables in implementation scope
Write output dependency guarantees relating visible outputs to visible inputs in type scope
Use case-provided thresholds and legal visible feature names for input assumptions and output guarantees
generic_rules: Treat each annex agree block as scoped to its owning component declaration
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless the model exposes explicit typed ports or constants
AGREE expressions may only reference identifiers visible in the current component scope
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `eq name : type = expression;` for equations and `const name : type = value;` for constants
Use `assign output = expression;` syntax for implementation-level bindings
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in a component type annex
Do not copy identifiers from examples or invent ports/components
